<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/core/hmac_sign.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:13Z

## Purpose
HMAC request signing · Iter 28 · C5 closure.

Per §47.6 + §6.x · for cross-service / webhook security · the receiver
verifies signature was computed with a shared secret.

Header contract:
  X-Insur-Signature: v1=<hex>
  X-Insur-Signature-Timestamp: <unix-epoch>

The signed payload is: f"v1
{timestamp}
{method}
{path}
{body_hash}"
where body_hash = sha256(body).hexdigest().

Verifier rejects if timestamp older than MAX_AGE_SECONDS (default 300).

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import hashlib
- from `_` import hmac
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import time
- from `fastapi` import HTTPException, Request

## Inputs
- Env vars: INSUR_HMAC_MAX_AGE, INSUR_HMAC_SECRET

## Process
### Functions
- `_payload(method, path, body, timestamp)`: (no docstring)
- `sign(method, path, body, secret, timestamp)`: (no docstring)
- `verify(method, path, body, signature_header, timestamp_header)`: (no docstring)
- `async require_hmac(request)`: FastAPI dependency · raises 401 when signature invalid.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
